The residence

Geneviève

A second-floor one-bedroom residence at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë. A calm, well-lit plan of over 92 square metres gross in the stone village quarter — steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach that anchors this stretch of the Riviera.

Location within the resort

Geneviève · Zona G8, Green Coast Resort

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Geneviève sits

Geneviève sits in the upper centre of the village, on the lane that leads down from the hotel. The central plaza is a short walk below, the parking entrance just beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

Upper centre, on the lane down from the hotel
